name: hud_ui_panel_constructor_copy
description: HudUiPanel::ConstructorCopy copies the text-label base, clears textPick, clones colors/font/cached text, copies panel layout/text fields, and forces textDirty to one.
known_limits: Depends on HudUiTextLabel::Constructor and HudUiElement::CopyFrom, which are functionally accepted but still carry isolated byte-shape drift.

VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ConstructorCopy@HudUiPanel@@QAEPAU1@PBU1@@Z at 0x4ba9e0 still fails: 526 unmasked mismatches, 84 relocation bytes masked, 8 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 348 bytes and the VC object symbol is 640 bytes. The isolated manifest emits substantially different helper/source-shape around inherited copy drift, font cloning, and panel field copies.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows HudUiTextLabel::Constructor, textPick clear, color copies, font clone through GetObjectA/CreateFontIndirectA, cached text strncpy, textDirty forced to one, and copies of text metrics, wrap/text rects, alignment, and shadow offsets.
The native panel smoke validates copied fields and forced textDirty behavior through the panel copy path.
